ddls:
CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each programming language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the programming language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the programming language */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the language was released */,
  "paradigm" TEXT /* Programming paradigm of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the programming language */,
  "week_date" TEXT /* Date of the week for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the language for the given week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the external data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data integration */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date the last data synchronization occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Permission to view data */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Permission to edit data */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Permission to delete data */,
  "can_generate_reports" INTEGER /* Permission to generate reports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the programming language */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_popularity" INTEGER /* Predicted popularity of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the programming language */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., popularity, trend) */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_triggers" (
  "trigger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each triggered alert */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that was triggered */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "trigger_reason" TEXT /* Reason for triggering the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trigger_id")
)
